title: calamintha nepetoides var. subnuda
intro: Calamintha nepetoides var. subnuda, also known as a type of mountain mint, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Calamintha nepetoides var. subnuda include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and relieving respiratory issues such as colds and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and topical applications, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
